heading: Prerequisites
body:
To complete this tutorial, you must have the following:

- Self-managed deployment of MongoDB v8.2 or later Community Edition
  with MongoDB Search and MongoDB Vector Search

  To learn more, see [MongoDB Vector Search Quick Start](vector-search-quick-start).

- Valid Voyage AI API (Application Programming Interface) key or keys

  To learn more, see [Voyage AI API (Application Programming Interface) Keys](voyage-api-key-for-auto-embed).

* MongoDB Compass

- [mongosh](mongodb-shell)

* [Go driver](go) v2.1 or later

- [Java Sync driver](java/sync) v5.7 or later

* [Node.js driver](node) v7.0 or later

- [PyMongo driver](pymongo) v4.16 or later

* [.NET/C# driver](csharp) v3.6 or later
